content.en:
Under normal circumstances, if a Sevenfold Peak Ancestor wanted to be promoted to a half-step Eightfold Ancestor, he needed to comprehend his own Yuan Dao to the Perfection Realm, which was the minimum requirement.

Secondly, there are also requirements for the life level, that is, the minimum must reach 10, if the life level of the sevenfold ancestor does not even reach 10, then it is difficult to become a half-step eightfold ancestor.

Consummation Yuan Dao, the life level reaches 10 or above, and after these two conditions are met, you can go to the half-step Eightfold Ancestor.

Of course, if you only reach life level 10, the success rate is not high, and it is still the possibility of failure, and once you fail, it will be extremely difficult to succeed in the second impact.

"I can now impact the half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor Realm, and I only need to use the Extreme Endless Yuan Dao to refine my body!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Somewhat similar to the Sixfold Origin Ancestor Peak Impact Half-Step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Peak Impact Half-Step Eightfold Origin Ancestor needs to refine the body again on the current basis and break the boundaries of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Peak.

If the level of life is low, it will be difficult to break this boundary, or even impossible to break it.

That's why it's required to have a life level of 10 or more!

However, there are not many boundaries for the Half-Step Eightfold Ancestor, there is only one boundary, and once it is broken, it will be the Half-Step Eightfold Ancestor.

And the half-step Yae Ancestor doesn't need to continue to break the boundary!

There are still dozens of boundaries for the Half-Step Sevenfold Ancestor, but the Half-Step Eightfold Ancestor is just this boundary.

Of course, even if it is a boundary, it will take a long time to break.

The average Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Peak Dao Ancestor Ten Billion Origin Domain Era is not enough, it will take even longer years, but he will not take that long.

......

In the following years, Ye Tian used the crazy resources of the Extreme Endless Yuan Dao to refine his body.

Again, his life level is very high, so the effect of refining is very good.

In addition, Ye Tian did not lack resources, so the speed of body refining was even faster.

In the following days, Ye Tian kept in retreat and did not do tasks, just to break through the half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor realm.

Before you know it, the five billion Primordial Era years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally touched the existence of the boundary, as long as he broke it, he could become a half-step Eightfold Ancestor.

"Let's go to Gimhae to break through!"

Ye Tian opened his eyes and walked out of the retreat.

The Golden Sea is a treasure land specially used for breakthroughs in the Nine-Storied Building, and the last time he broke through to the Sevenfold Ancestor, it was in the Golden Sea Treasure Land of the Nine-Story Building that he broke through.

Of course, he went up to enter an area suitable for the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor.

This time, he went to the area where the Sevenfold Ancestor Peak should go, and he needed more points, a full 500 points to enter there.

After Ye Tian paid 500 points, he came to an area in the deeper part of the Golden Sea, preparing to break through here.

"Break through!"

Ye Tianyi broke through the boundary, and his body began to swallow the energy of the golden sea, undergoing a huge transformation.

Gradually, Ye Tian's body absorbed a huge amount of energy, and completely stabilized in the half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor realm.

At this time, his strength is much stronger than in the past.

"The half-step Eightfold Ancestor has finally reached this realm and met the requirements, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor should give me that place!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he told the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor the news of his breakthrough.

Subsequently, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor gave him a place to enter that secret place.

At this time, there were still more than four billion years of Origin Domain Era before entering that secret place, so he could continue to cultivate and improve his strength.

However, he had already reached the realm of the half-step Eightfold Ancestor, in addition to raising his cultivation to the limit again and improving some of his extreme will, only by raising his life level could he improve his strength more.

After all, he has now raised the Yuan Dao to the extreme realm, and he has also mastered the unsurpassed Yuan Dao control technique, and there is no way to continue to improve in other aspects.

It can be said that he only needs to cultivate for a while longer, and he can even impact the Eightfold Origin Ancestor realm.

Of course, it was impossible for him to attack the Eightfold Origin Ancestor Realm now.

An ordinary half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor would be so eager to impact the Eightfold Ancestor, and he naturally needed the most perfect way to break through to the Eightfold Ancestor.

How to break through in a perfect way, that is, after condensing the Ninefold Yuan Dao embryo, and then break through to the Eightfold Ancestor.

In that case, the condensed Yuan Dao Dao Flower would be the Ninefold Yuan Dao Dao Flower.

However, most Dao Ancestors didn't know this secret at all, thinking that after comprehending the Supreme Yuan Dao Control Technique and comprehending the Extreme Yuan Dao, they would be able to impact the Eightfold Origin Ancestor.

And the Eightfold Origin Ancestor who broke through like this is also a weaker Eightfold Origin Ancestor, and he will be in the Eightfold Origin Ancestor realm for a lifetime.

Although the goal of many Dao Ancestors in their lifetime is also the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, and then stay in a large region that is not strong and become the top existence, that's all.

But Ye Tian's goal was the Ninefold Origin Ancestor or even a stronger existence, so he naturally wanted to pursue perfection.

"Break through to the Eightfold Origin Ancestor, don't be in a hurry, let's prepare for entering that secret place first!"

Ye Tian next stabilized the realm, raised his cultivation to the current limit, and by the way, raised his life level a little more.

In this way, a period of time passed, and gradually it was time to enter the secret place.

......

"Although the cultivation has not reached the limit of the half-step eightfold ancestor, it is almost there, and the will of the extreme path has improved a lot, as for the life level......

Ye Tian tested his life level, and he had already surpassed 30 and reached a level of 29.9.

When he first broke through to the half-step Eightfold Ancestor, his life level suddenly soared to 29, and after a period of time, he was once again promoted to some life levels, infinitely close to 30!

Compared with when he first broke through, his current strength has increased by at least three percent.

......

Ancient Spring Xuanlou.

Ye Tian saw the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor again.

This time, the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor was going to take him to the entrance of that secret place.

And Guquan Xuanlou was not only Ye Tian's half-step eightfold ancestor in the past, in addition to him, there were also six half-step eightfold ancestors who had obtained this place.

"Are there so few places?"

Ye Tian was a little puzzled.

But I quickly figured it out, it was not that there were few places, but that there were few official members of the half-step eightfold ancestor level of the Guquan Xuanlou.

Like the members of the Nine-Fold Building, they basically comprehended the Extreme Yuan Dao when they were at the peak of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor, and they definitely created the Supreme Yuan Dao Control Technique.

Therefore, once they become half-step Yae Ancestor, it will not take a long time for them to improve their strength to a point where it is difficult to improve.

In that case, they would only be able to attack the Eightfold Origin Realm.

Even if the condensation Yuan Dao embryo would waste a long time, it still wouldn't allow them to stay in this realm for too long.

Therefore, the number of half-step eightfold ancestors in the Nine-Story Building is definitely not much, and it is even many times less than the eight-fold original ancestors.
